reviews.review_description: How did you make this game is fire

developer_response.body:
So glad you're enjoying Litesport!

Joyce

reviews.review_description:
For a price a bit higher than Supernatural, the quality was horrible.  First, it lacks mixed reality until you're in a routine, which makes it difficult to setup your position in the room.

Second, the app crashed during signing up with my email.  This alone supported other negative review posts.  Third, it had lagged and out of sync spots during the routine.  Fourth, the trainers are very low quality... look like paper cutouts it's so bad.

For the price, I expected far more from it. I ended up canceling the 7 day free trial within the first 30 minutes. 😞
I actually liked the ap until out of no where the stole 200 dollars from me DO NOT SUBSCRIBE!!

developer_response.body:
It appears you purchased your membership directly through the Meta Store, so I'm unable to view your transactions or issue a refund. You will need to contact Meta Support directly for that, https://www.meta.com/help/quest/828412189021014/?srsltid=AfmBOop2ktt6L6NO-xokFbnR_2SZa64z7J1x6eImXE94Hlt3k5Y2a7kA

Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: If you buy a year premium,it will cost a lot, plus it is very glitchy for the prices.
It gives you a workout
imagine having to pay for a game and the worst part is they scam 13$ just to play a game is WILD.
Would buy but will never sign up to a subscription

Started the free trial, got to the strength tutorial and dude wanted to do standing overhead shoulder presses with dumbbells..... lol wth? Who in their right mind thought you could do that without hitting your headset over and over? 1 star. That's literally all I needed to see before canceling my subscription.

Edit: @dev - No. Wide arms? Lol! That's how you damage your anterior deltoids. Maybe with air or extremely light and small dumbbells, sure. Tell me you don't work out with heavy weights in real life without telling me.

developer_response.body:
I completed the Strength tutorial while testing yesterday. Keep your arms wide until you fully press up to avoid hitting the headset. This is the correct form for the move. There are plenty of strength workouts to try. Since you have a 7-day free trial, I hope you will check out other workouts and see what you think. 

Thank you for the feedback.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: The game says its free but then tells you to pay money now that's just stupid but other then that its ok

developer_response.body:
There is a 7-day free trial, but Litesport is a subscription-based application. I apologize if there was some confusion about that. I hope you have a chance to try out the different workout options in the app -- Boxing, Strength, Total Body, Combo Hero, and Daily Dash. You may find one you enjoy!

Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: I love the workouts. Very expensive though. I like that there is weight training. But this app constantly glitches. Hoping they fix it. I want to keep the app but its so flippin pricey. We will see what i decide after the trial period if its worth the price.

developer_response.body:
So sorry you're experiencing glitchiness. Could you provide more details on what you mean by glitchy? If you prefer, you can contact Customer Support directly at support@litesport.com.

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review!

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: I tried the premium plan and just love it. I have trainers in my own living room. I love the 6 week program , it allows me to know on a weekly basis what to do. Best fitness app out there as you can do boxing, strenght training a  very professional way. iThanks Lite sport. I love the trainers's energy . Only negative point: The monthly price.

I bought my new meta quest in the beginning of this year and I used various workout apps. This one by far has been the one that I have experienced the most problems with. Glitches loading and glitches within the workouts. Not enjoyable. Really wanted it to work.

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry that you're experiencing issues with our product. It would be helpful to get more information from you to understand what is going on. What model Quest headset do you have, and can you provide more information about the glitchiness you experience when the app loads or during workouts? 

Please contact Support directly at support@litesport.com so I can assist you further. 

Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: This got me off the couch and moving. Seems like a good program so far

developer_response.body:
So glad to hear you're enjoying it!

Joyce Litesport

reviews.review_description: Personally, I don't like it. Weight training is fine, but the rest is badly implemented, punching bag and rhythm boxing is frustrating and doesn't feel rewarding. A lot of talk and little reward with a mediocre workout that mainly wastes your time.
I enjoy how convenient this app is and fun. Did a full boxing workout at home.

Just join litesport this morning on a 7-Day trial. I was surprised to get an email telling me that it was going to cost me $229 per year if I keep the app. The first time I used it, I found a number of glitches. Things such as the pass-through did not work, all I have was passed through I did not have a visual except for my office I was w
orking out. I found with some of the videos that they were flickering, as well as the sound. I will try it for a day or two more to see if it was just a internet thing or these glitches are in the software. But even if I really like it, at 229 a year it's more expensive than the gym, I may look for other software.

developer_response.body:
Hello rkmoray, 

We appreciate you leaving your feedback for our team and trying out Litesport! Litesport is available for a few different options: Standard Memberships are $8.99/month and $89.99/year; Premium Memberships are $18.99/month and &179.99/year. Please reach out to our team and we can make sure you are on your preferred choice at support@litesport.com. We would also love to find out more information regarding the glitches you mentioned as that is not normal behavior. We look forward to hearing from you and making sure you're having the best experience possible! 

Thank you, 

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_description: So I brought this when I first became a Meta Quest player a few years ago and I loved everything about it, but it stopped working figuring I needed an upgrade or more space I upgraded my device 6 months ago….and the game has still not been working properly! It did not let me install it onto my newer Quest device an once it did install it would not allow me to open it and it also wants me to repay for something I already own which has been frustrating because I like to use the LiteSport for my workouts and can not or have not been able to play it…..

developer_response.body:
I'm so sorry you are having problems using the Litesport application. It is a subscription-based app, so if you are being prompted to pay, it may be that the last subscription you purchased has expired. 

I would need further information to look up your account and confirm this, or determine if there is another problem.

Please get in touch with Support directly at support@litesport.com so that I may assist you further. 

Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description:
Here's the problem. Right now, I'm bored with the free stuff, but I don't want a monthly subscription, so let me BUY a new workout.

Right now I'm gonna stop using this cos, bored, and I WANT to give the company MONEY, but there is no way to do this beyond a, frankly, costly subscription model that I don't want, so me, my money, this app, part company. 

Beatsaber does not require a subscription. Beatsaber makes money selling add ons. I want to give you money. You are a company. Make the bit where I give you money an option.

You don't even need to get rid of the subscription option,  just add a third option for individual add ons. Easy.

EDIT: and now I can't play at all. My feedback was useless, and the developer took the greedy path.

THE END

I tried it briefly for the addition of weights in VR, but it didn't track anything other than the amount of time spent on each muscle group.  The models/teachers were 2D which was less immersive than the alternatives.

The app also glitched and blinked a lot on my quest 3 which was unpleasant.  

I can comment on the other exercises as I'm using a paid alternative I like.  

The subscription free trial was easy to activate and cancel via meta.

developer_response.body:
Hello gouldog, 

Thanks for taking time to leave your feedback and for trying out Litesport; we're sorry to hear the weights didn't feel engaging and about the glitches you experienced on your Quest 3. Our team would love to find out more details about your experience—could you let us know what kind of glitches were happening, and during which workouts at support@litesport.com? We'd love to get this figured out so you can experience Litesport as intended.
 
We apologize again for the issues during your trial but look forward to assisting you further!

Thank you, 

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_description: Great weight training.

reviews.review_title: Can’t exit the app, 1 fps performance
reviews.review_description:
There is no way to exit the app, pressing the oculus button does nothing and if you hold it to reset your view as with every single vr app ever, the apps just hangs. Sometimes the oculus menu pops up but you can’t interact with it. 
performance of the app slows to less than 1fps when doing this btw. 
Same happens if you try to switch to controllers from hand tracking. Love the app otherwise, please fix this. Quest 2 on V74

developer_response.body:
Hello DSteyvon, 

Thank you for leaving your feedback regarding not being able to exit and app performance. Can you please reach out to our team at support@litesport.com so they can get additional details from you and find a solution? We want to make sure you can use Litesport as intended, especially since you are enjoying the app otherwise! 

Thank you, 

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_title: Strength Training with Dumbbell in VR!!
reviews.review_description: I am a huge fan of working out in VR. Prior to VR I could never remain consistent. As we get older aches and pains take over and working out can be painful. When I put my headset on all those issue seem to melt away. I have been consistent over 3 years now, but I know strength training is something I needed to add. I had been looking for the ability to work on building muscle with weights in VR and ran across someone sharing about their success with Dumbbell's  in Litesport over the past year. I was excited to check it out so I signed up for the trial and was pleasantly surprised and jumped right in. The trainers are great and the challenge's are just what I was looking for. It uses passthrough so you can see your weights to use them and Litesport is just what I was looking for to add to my routine. Check it out!

I tried the free trial and I was hooked! The workouts are fun and challenging. I love that you have options from weights to boxing to full body workouts. I also love that your trainer is right there with you. It makes me feel like I’m working out with a friend.

Like so many others have said - I highly recommend working out on the VR. As a full-time employee, mom, wife, etc - finding the time and motivation to go to the gym is unlikely. I use Litesport to supplement my work outs on the days where I am not running as it reminds me that working out doesn’t have to be tedious or unenjoyable. The best part is doing it from the comfort of my own home (even with the perplexed looks from the dogs as their human seemingly punches the air for an hour). I love the trainer led classes and the music selection is on point. I hope Meta eventually comes out with a better grip for their controllers to use with games like this.

I just started using Litesport to support my fitness regimen. I specifically use it for instructor-guided dumbbell weight training.

All the instructors are wonderful and give you just the right amount of encouragement. 

Eventually, I'll build up to include Litesport's other offerings, including the Pilates program that looks interesting. 

I gave it only 4 stars for the reason that I had some difficulty with support as I tried to get them to apply a promo that was being offered.

developer_response.body:
Hello froese5664,

Thanks for taking time to leave your feedback! We're so glad to hear you're enjoying Litesport weight training and of your interest in trying out other programs in the app. 

We apologize for the delay with your promo request—our support team is actively working on finding a solution and will continue to keep you updated. 

If you have any other questions, concerns or comments, don't hesitate to let us know (support@litesport.com)!

Thank you, 

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_description: Great app! Alot of variation, feedback, and stats. All things I love. I like the music choices but don't really like paying twice as much for real songs. This is my go to app for vr workouts right now.

Fun workout app! Downloaded the free the version and I enjoyed it that much I decided to buy the premium subscription. Definitely recommend this app to anyone who is wanting to lose weight and have fun whilst doing it!

I started this app two days ago and it is amazing! I did a boxing workout and a strength training workout both days and I am so sore!! I can tell it is really working even though each workout was only 10 minutes at a time. I love having the trainer right there with me and the music in the background to keep it fun. The boxing does a great job walking you through each part.  I will definitely keep doing this app.

reviews.review_title: Never thought I would sweat with VR!
reviews.review_description: I have really enjoyed Litesport App for working out over the past year. My favorite trainers are GW and Lissa! I feel really strong with the strength and full body classes, and am so grateful to have discovered this program.

Played litesport and so far I like everything. The one exception is with the licensed music. As the app is rated “T” the music is the censored version. A big disappointment in an otherwise great app so far.
This has really been fun to use and is a good gateway for working out

This is a fabulous workout 💪 
I can say my muscles are truly sore from 2 days of 30 min each day.

The coaches are recorded flat, 2D, they look weird, unnatural and blurry, even their proportions are off. The environments are static, no micro movements, no sound, just poor quality photos, some with jpeg artifacts, which is not acceptable at all. The programs are boring, with too much talking, not entertaining whatsoever. And the subscription price is way too high compared to the competitors.

developer_response.body:
Hey sergepav, 

Thanks for leaving your review and trying out Litesport! We will let our team know your detailed feedback here—we appreciate you taking time to leave your feedback.

We would love to hear any other comments or concerns you may have; please reach out to support@litesport.com or submit a request below: 

https://support.litesport.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

If you tried Premium, you may want to try out our Standard Membership which is only $8.99: 

https://support.litesport.com/hc/en-us/articles/23521534492557-What-is-the-difference-between-Premium-and-Standard-Membership

Thank you, 

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_description: Unable to cancel subscription. Allows me to select option to cancel but then another window pops up to see if I’m sure i want to cancel & then it does not allow me to move or scroll beyond that point to confirm cancellation. Please fix or cancel subscription for me.

developer_response.body:
Hello BeautyfulBrown, 

Thanks for leaving your feedback, though we apologize for any confusion attempting to cancel your subscription. This can be done at any time on your Meta app on in-headset—to cancel in your headset, please use the instructions below:

Click the Meta Store Icon and select your account in the top right-hand corner of the menu. Click on subscriptions, then find and select your active Litesport subscription. Scroll to the bottom of the page and click "Cancel Subscription"

Our team will be happy to help if you need further assistance; please reach out to support@litesport.com.

Thanks!

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_description: We pay for the premium content and there has not been any new content in 3 months. My wife has used every premium exercise where it's full body, and she can almost repeat the coach's words, word for word.  The new fitness trainer thing uses the same content, just reorganized.

developer_response.body:
Hey Spaceyunicorn, 

Thanks so much for taking time to leave your feedback! We would love to find out more about your experience as we do add new content every week, so you should be seeing new Total Body classes each week. Our team is happy to chat at your earliest convenience (support@litesport.com). 

Thanks again for leaving a comment and trying Litesport!

Lilly
Litesport

reviews.review_title: No longer has ability to play free conte
reviews.review_description:
Update no longer has free content. Was a fun game, but sucks they didn’t keep the free part. Can’t afford yearly or monthly 😒too bad they couldn’t just have you buy add ons like beat saber or synth Ryders.

I am loving this app! They have a free basic or freemium subscription! Thats the one I have. Great music to get you into the workout! Quick plays or timed workouts! This is a daily log into game for me!!

reviews.review_title: Great relief from the gym... for now!
reviews.review_description: I like the convenience of it being right in the house.  It actually feels like working with a trainer.  The music has also been good.  I'm sold so far!!
It's a great fitness workout from what I used as I only tried the free version. I think its a little over priced hence the 4 stars.

I am new to Oculus and this is the first app that i tried. I am having a heck of a time. The quick workouts help me get my heart rate up and break a sweat. I recommend this to beginners as well as more advanced boxers.
It would kick me out and log me out
great for working out, built up serious sweat and also helps with endurance and stamina. Great overall

reviews.review_title: Great Workout! Even for Older Adults.
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this Lit Boxing since its challenging and fun. My hubby is 65 plus and finds the instructions easy to follow. Wish the targets vould fladh numbers with punching. It easy to follow and catch on to the routines. Treat yourself to a fun workout with some sweating. We appreciate the free version and might upgrade. Hope to free version put more workouts into the app. We will recommend to our  friends and family.

The app had "Get" and when it says that the game is free. I proceeded to sign up and when I went to play I was prompted to do a free week trial. I wasn't interested and it did not have the option to exit out of the Liteboxing App. I had to finish the set up for the free trial. I don't feel that is a good marketing technique. The Liteboxing app should have the disclaimer of a free trial, $18.99/month up front.
Really got me going and i will use it daily

At first I had just downloaded it to test it, telling myself that it was basic but not, the game even in the free version are very complete and allows you to train well while having fun!
I really recommend it to those who want to discover a good VR boxing game
Ligteboxer is a fun app that got me sweating in no time. Does not even feel like a workout while doing it!
And it’s not free you need a subscription the dude AT THE beginning  talks for too long and you’re not able to skip BORING

developer_response.body: Hi MiLkYwAyX - Sorry to hear you didn't like the app. We'd love any additional feedback you're willing to give! Just send us an email at feedback@liteboxer.com.

reviews.review_description: Excellent for working out in the morning. The free membership has several training options unlike others that have one short trial.
The game is really expensive and too many glitches

developer_response.body:
Hey alb0e,

Thanks so much for leaving your feedback regarding game glitches you experienced and subscription cost. On May 5th we are implementing updates based on a lot of specific feedback, and would love if you could give Liteboxer VR a second chance. The subscription requirement has been removed (though still available for those looking to workout to their favorite top-charting artists), and we'd love to hear your thoughts or any additional feedback you may have! 

Kind regards,
The Liteboxer Team

reviews.review_description: It different routines and the music is great.  I like to use the free punches on rough days.

This boxing app is just what I needed! I have never boxed before, but the levels and instructions continue to help me improve my form and how I feel. I've struggles with losing weight, and this app gets me motivated and engaged enough that I was able to finally push past my weight plateau! I really enjoy doing the workouts, and will keep using the app to help me stay in shape.
Love them keep me active fun and gets your heart rate going
It’s really good for burning calories and practicing
Good routine for upper body without fear of hurting the knees.

I love that you can access many features without having to pay. It lets me get in a small workout and really gets me going. I think it could definitely use some fixing on how close the punching bags are as they sometime are too close to each other but overall love it.
This app has helped me out a lot and is also a great way to stay active. Honestly who needs the gym when you can have apps like these that help you stay active and fit
I was starting to get bored of my workouts and now I look forword to playing/working out. The music is great and I can’t wait to see what other artists they add to the mix!
This you can play free. And get fit really good and especially since I couldn’t find many free fitness games.
Was surprised to see this app available on the Oculus. Have been doing the basic version (free) & getting a good workout. Will probably upgrade to premium in the near future.

reviews.review_title: A Great Way to Exercise Without The Gym
reviews.review_description: Liteboxer is an exceptional game, in that its small snippets of cardio are great for beginners, yet allows you to build upon these short sessions to longer more challenging programs. There is the option to subscribe monthly and reap benefits, but even without a subscription Liteboxer is an excellent cardio exercise. Especially for those who hate to exercise. I have used Liteboxer for several weeks and have thoroughly enjoyed the outcome so far. Definitely worth downloading and give it a try.
